name: teak-raycast
title: Teak
description: Save ideas fast, search your Teak cards, and access favorites directly from Raycast.
author: praveenjuge

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Generate in Teak Settings > API Keys, then paste it here.

commands.name: quick-save
commands.title: Quick Save
commands.subtitle: Capture text or links to Teak
commands.description: Save text or URLs to Teak without leaving your workflow

commands.name: save-clipboard-url
commands.title: Save Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Capture copied text or links to Teak
commands.description: Save the current clipboard contents to Teak in one step

commands.name: save-current-browser-tab
commands.title: Save Current Browser Tab
commands.subtitle: Capture the active browser tab
commands.description: Save the current browser tab to Teak using Raycast Browser Extension

commands.name: search-cards
commands.title: Search Cards
commands.subtitle: Find anything in your Teak vault
commands.description: Find any Teak card by content, tags, or metadata

commands.name: favorites
commands.title: Favorites
commands.subtitle: Open your saved favorites fast
commands.description: Browse and open your favorited Teak cards

tools.name: search-cards
tools.title: Search Teak Cards
tools.description: Search Teak cards by text, type, tags, favorites, and sort order.

tools.name: get-card
tools.title: Get Teak Card
tools.description: Fetch the full details of a specific Teak card by id.

tools.name: save-card
tools.title: Save to Teak
tools.description: Save a note or URL to the user's Teak library.

ai.instructions: Use search-cards to find relevant Teak cards, get-card for follow-up detail on a specific card, and save-card only when the user explicitly asks to save something.
